fields.summary: Anthropic is an AI research and safety company that develops Claude, an AI assistant governed by a publicly documented 'Constitution.' The company maintains a research program, publishes responsible scaling and transparency policies, operates a trust and security center, and offers educational resources through its Anthropic Academy.
fields.funding: not disclosed in the cited sources
fields.headcount: not disclosed in the cited sources
fields.recent_signal: not disclosed in the cited sources
